description: Shipt is a grocery and retail delivery service that powers consumer shopping and partner integrations for order fulfillment and memberships. Its platform lets partner retailers embed Shipt shopping and delivery capabilities into their own apps and websites.
summary: Shipt exposes a partner-facing HTTP Platform API authenticated with Shipt-issued OAuth credentials, plus a public MCP endpoint at https://member-api.shipt.com/marketplace-mcp/mcp.
